query: Birkebeinerrennet cross country ski race Rena to Lillehammer

videos.title: Birkebeinerrennet English version
videos.description: The legendary Birkebeiner ski race is a cross-country race starting at Rena to the finish in Lillehammer. The 54 km, classic technic, race crosses two mountains, and the course takes you through breathtaking sceneries

videos.title: Highlights Birkebeinerrennet 2025 I Ski Classics Pro Tour
videos.description:
🔥 Birkebeinerrennet 2025 delivered an unforgettable race as the world’s top long-distance skiers battled through 54 km of demanding terrain in Norway. This legendary race, part of the Ski Classics Pro Tour, takes skiers across the breathtaking mountain pass from Rena to Lillehammer, carrying the traditional 3.5 kg backpack—a tribute to the historic Birkebeiner warriors.

🏆 Winners of Birkebeinerrennet 2025:
🥇 Men: Andreas Nygaard (Team Ragde Charge)
🥇 Women: Stina Nilsson (Team Ragde Charge)

Relive the most exciting moments, from early breakaways to the intense final sprint! Who had the best tactics? Who dominated the climbs? Watch now to see how the race unfolded!

📌 Subscribe to SC The Ski Community for more interviews, race highlights, and exclusive Ski Classics content. Subscribe Here:    / @sctheskicommunity  

🔗 Discover more about Ski Classics and cross-country skiing:
🌐 Ski Classics Official Website: https://skiclassics.com/
🌐 Längd.se (Swedish): https://www.langd.se/
🌐 Langrenn.com (Norwegian): https://www.langrenn.com/
🌐 Maastohiihto (Finnish): https://www.maastohiihto.com/
🌐 ProXCskiing: https://www.proxcskiing.com/

💬 Join the conversation:
What did you think of this year's Birkebeinerrennet? Drop your thoughts in the comments!

#Birkebeinerrennet #SkiClassics #CrossCountrySkiing #Längdskidåkning #Langrenn #Maastohiihto

videos.title: The Ski Marathon (Birken 2016)
videos.description:
I went to Norway and did the Birkebeinerrennet with some friends. It's a 54km cross country ski marathon that takes you from Rena to Lillehammer, over 2 mountains. It was epic!  


 
Music:
Jon Hopkins
Akov
The Chromatics
Lost Years
Dub Colossus

I am also here:
instagram.com/finnianmoore
twitter.com/finnianmoore

SUBSCRIBEEEEEEEE

videos.title: Birkebiennerrennet 18th March 2017
videos.description: Ski race of 54km distance from Rena to Lillehammer in Norway over two mountains

videos.title: Fischer Nordic l Birkebeinerrennet Stage Intro Emil Persson 23l24
videos.description:
The 54 km Birkebeiner race from Rena to Lillehammer is one of the highlights of the Ski Classics series. Emil Persson tells us more about the unique characteristics of this race and its special challenges.

Moving pictures from @Ski Classics

FOLLOW FISCHER SPORTS ON SOCIAL 
▲ Fischer Ski on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fischerski
▲ Fischer Nordic on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fischernordic
▲ Fischer Ski on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fischerski 
▲ Fischer Nordic on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fischernordic


▲ Visit our Website: http://www.fischersports.com 


SKIING IS OUR LIFE.
Fischer’s vision is to be the athlete’s number one choice through outstanding products, made for everlasting moments and new levels of individual performance. Our mission is to enable athletes to enjoy their sport and excel to the next level by introducing the most innovative, reliable, and easy to use products.


For us, skiing is not a lifestyle. It’s life. #livetoski

videos.description:
Race report från Birkebeinerrennet 2022. En film i Point-Of-View format från start i Rena till mål i Lillehammer. Filmat och skidat av Magnus Högfeldt

videos.title: Get ready for the Birkebeinerrennet 2024 🇳🇴 - Cross-country skiing at its best 😎 ☀️ ❄️
videos.description:
With more than 7.000 skiers joining this adventure, the Birkebeinerrennet is Norway's greatest ski marathon. It is a member of the Worldloppet Skifederation and stands for tradition and sportsmanship. 

For 2024's edition taking place on February 16th already more than 7.000 skiers are registered. 
Early bird entry is still possible. 

The organizers also have composed a month by month training plan to make you fit for race day. 
👉 https://www.worldloppet.com/7000-skiers-for-a-superb-birkebeinerrennet-2024/

Join the Birkebeinerrennet 2024.

videos.title: Birkebeinerrennet
videos.description:
Med deg bærer du en sekk på 3,5 kg og et 800 år gammelt sagn om Kongeriket Norge.
https://birkebeiner.no/no/nyheter/derfor-gar-du-med-sekk_1

videos.title: Could this be the HARDEST race I've ever done? - Birkebeinerrennet 2025
videos.description:
I was warned about how hard this race would be, but it still took me by surprise how long and disgustingly hard the climbs actually are. 

Follow me on socials
Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/10202509
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/andreasfausko/
